summary: Iteration 12 — Engagement Status Casing Fix Verification. All uppercase status fixes confirmed working. Found and fixed one additional bug: validateEngagementSubmission action was missing rejection_reason in UPDATE payload, causing check_rejection_reason_required DB constraint violation (23514). After fix, full approve/reject/validate-queue flow verified end-to-end.

critical.issue: UPDATE payload for REJECTED status missing rejection_reason field. DB has check constraint 'check_rejection_reason_required' requiring rejection_reason IS NOT NULL when status=REJECTED. Error: code 23514. FIXED in this iteration by adding updatePayload.rejection_reason = rejectReason?.trim() ?? null

action_items: Verify resubmit flow with actual operator account (admin cannot submit proofs, so resubmit flow could not be fully tested — needs an operator-role user). The resubmitEngagementProof code checks status === 'REJECTED' (uppercase) which is now correct.

The empty-reason client-side error message display in ValidateQueueClient (setRejectReasonError) works, but the error selector '[class*=error]' didn't detect it — likely uses a non-error CSS class (e.g. text-red). This is cosmetic only; server-side validation also blocks empty reasons.
critical_code_review_comments: engagement.ts: validateEngagementSubmission was missing rejection_reason in UPDATE payload — FIXED
engagement.ts had misleading comment 'no reject_reason column in schema' when column clearly exists with check constraint — FIXED (comment removed)
seed_data_creation: Inserted and cleaned up 3 test engagement submissions (storage_path: test/test-proof*.jpg) for verifying approve/reject flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: All engagement status casing issues from iteration_11 are resolved. Additional fix applied: rejection_reason now included in UPDATE payload. Full approve/reject/validate-queue E2E tested and working. Resubmit flow (operator perspective) and proof file upload still untested due to no operator account. Admin role cannot access own submissions on /engagement/submissions (shows 0 because admin has no operator_id submissions). Filter buttons on MySubmissionsClient confirmed uppercase (ALL/PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED).
rca_of_issue: DB schema has check constraint 'check_rejection_reason_required': when status='REJECTED', rejection_reason must be non-null. Code comment wrongly stated 'no reject_reason column in schema' leading to the field being omitted from the UPDATE payload. Fix: add updatePayload.rejection_reason = rejectReason?.trim() ?? null inside the REJECTED branch.
